{{- define "main" }} {{- /* {{- partial "img/solid-color-image.html" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "111dfe") "111dfe" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "#111dfe") "#111dfe" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "111zfe") "111zfe" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "#111zfe") "#111zfe" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "11ze") "11ze" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "#11ze") "#11ze" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "111dfea") "111dfea" }} {{- partialCached "img/solid-color-image.html" (dict "color" "#111dfea") "#111dfea" }} */ -}}
{{- $teaser := partial "img/overlay.html" (dict "image" site.Params.huggingface.images.site "size" 128) }}

{{ site.Params.Description }}

{{- .Store.Set "loadHighlightJS" true -}}
{{- .Content }} {{- end }}
